exercises.hindiScript: यह मेरी सबसे बड़ी उपलब्धि है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: My vocabulary has increased a lot.
Now I am ready for new opportunities.
I have completed this challenge.
This is my biggest achievement.

exercises.audioScript: I now speak English without hesitation.
exercises.hindiScript: मैं अब बिना झिझक के अंग्रेज़ी बोलता हूँ।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I can easily write emails and letters.
I am proud of my progress.

exercises.answer: I now speak English without hesitation.

exercises.audioScript: This course has proved very useful in my life.
exercises.hindiScript: यह कोर्स मेरे जीवन में बहुत उपयोगी साबित हुआ।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I can easily do daily conversations.

This course has proved very useful in my life.
exercises.answer: This course has proved very useful in my life.

exercises.audioScript: I worked hard every single day.
exercises.hindiScript: मैंने हर दिन कड़ी मेहनत की।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This is my biggest achievement.
I will take this test with confidence.
I speak confidently in the office.

exercises.audioScript: Now I am ready for new opportunities.
exercises.hindiScript: अब मैं नए अवसरों के लिए तैयार हूँ।

options: I now speak English without hesitation.

exercises.audioScript: I am proud of my progress.

options: This course has proved very useful in my life.

options: I worked hard every single day.

This is my final test.

exercises.audioScript: I will take this test with confidence.
exercises.hindiScript: मैं आत्मविश्वास से यह परीक्षा दूँगा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Now I am ready for new opportunities.
I have completed this challenge.
I can easily write emails and letters.

dictationPassage.text: This is my biggest achievement. I now speak English without hesitation. This course has proved very useful in my life. I worked hard every single day. Now I am ready for new opportunities.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: यह मेरी सबसे बड़ी उपलब्धि है। मैं अब बिना झिझक के अंग्रेज़ी बोलता हूँ। यह कोर्स मेरे जीवन में बहुत उपयोगी साबित हुआ। मैंने हर दिन कड़ी मेहनत की। अब मैं नए अवसरों के लिए तैयार हूँ।
